articles.title: Polygon Labs proposes upgrade of flagship sidechain to ‘zkEVM validium’
articles.description: Polygon Labs’ engineering team proposed an upgrade to the Polygon PoS sidechain to become a “zkEVM validium” network.

articles.title: Raising the stakes: Proposal to increase Ethereum max validator balance ignites debate
articles.description: A proposal to increase the maximum validator balance from the current 32 ETH to 2,048 ETH per validator has sparked diverse reactions within the Ethereum community.

articles.title: XRP Army Finds Ripple Link To IMF As It Announces CBDC Platform
articles.description: While the International Monetary Fund (IMF) announced that it is working on a platform for digital central bank currencies (CDBCs) yesterday, the XRP army has discovered an IMF report from March 2023 in which Ripple is considered a potential problem solver. Remarkably, the links between the IMF and Ripple Labs date back several years. IMF […]

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Downtrend Could Last Five More Months, Says Analyst Benjamin Cowen – Here’s His Outlook
articles.description: Cardano’s (ADA) bear market likely has a ways to go before bottoming out, according to closely followed crypto analyst Benjamin Cowen. In a new strategy session, Cowen says that based on past market cycles, ADA may need the rest of 2023 to find a bottom. Cowen also thinks that ADA/BTC is also worth keeping an […]
